name: Remake of Minecraft
title: The world famous game remade
summary: Minecraft has always been my favorite childhood game. I admire its efficiency—simple in concept, yet limitless in possibilities. I often wish I had come up with the idea first, but would I have been able to code it myself? Here’s my attempt.
